user_scenarios.user_goal: As an operator, run the Phase 2 demand-development loop with task-contract evaluator support, scenario command evidence, artifact hygiene, cleanup, and the final human merge gate documented as explicit steps.
prerequisites: Existing evaluator harness scripts are available.
No real Codex model call is required for the fake-driver scenario.
steps: Clear any previous evaluator-scenario-phase-2 run directory and smoke artifact.
Create a confirmed preflight run for the registered Phase 2 task id.
Run the fake Planner and Generator drivers to write planner-output.json and generator-result.json.
Write a non-empty .codex/tmp/phase-2-smoke-artifact.txt artifact and add it to generator-result.json.
Write task-contract.json with a passing scenario command.
Continue run_loop from evaluating so evaluator pass triggers artifact_hygiene, cleanup, and the human merge gate.
Verify run.json stops at passed_waiting_human_merge with scenario-command-results.json, artifact-manifest.json, and cleanup-result.json present.
expected_outcomes: planner-output.json, generator-result.json, and evaluator-result.json exist and validate.
task-contract.json includes at least one passing scenario command.
scenario-command-results.json records the scenario command output.
artifact-manifest.json records the generated smoke artifact scan before cleanup.
cleanup-result.json records cleanup before the human merge gate.
failure_signals: The loop executes without confirmed preflight.
The loop reports complete instead of waiting for human merge.
Evaluator pass skips artifact_hygiene when generator artifacts are present.
Cleanup runs before artifact hygiene or leaves the run in an active phase.
cleanup: The helper removes the previous .codex/loop-runs/evaluator-scenario-phase-2 directory and .codex/tmp/phase-2-smoke-artifact.txt before each run.
A successful run may leave .codex/loop-runs/evaluator-scenario-phase-2 and .codex/tmp/phase-2-smoke-artifact.txt as evidence.
